# Streamlink DRM AppImage Release

This release contains pre-built AppImage binaries for Streamlink with DRM support.

## Download

Download the appropriate AppImage file for your architecture:

- **x86_64**: For most desktop computers and laptops
- **aarch64**: For ARM64 systems (e.g., Apple Silicon, Raspberry Pi)

## Usage

1. Download the AppImage file
2. Make it executable: `chmod +x streamlink-*.AppImage`
3. Run it: `./streamlink-*.AppImage [options] <URL> [quality]`

## Features

- Self-contained executable (no installation required)
- Includes FFmpeg for stream processing
- Supports all Streamlink plugins and features
- DRM support enabled

## Requirements

- Linux x86_64 or aarch64
- GLIBC 2.28 or newer

For more information, visit the [Streamlink documentation](https://streamlink.github.io/).
